zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor FitzPiers於1254年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親Reginald FitzPiers47歲，母親Alice Stanford35歲。她於大約1267年與Sir John Mohun在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1294年在英國享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor FitzPiers于1254年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲Reginald FitzPiers47岁，母亲Alice Stanford35岁。她于大约1267年与Sir John Mohun在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1294年在英国享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor FitzPiers was born in 1254, in Dunster, Somerset, England, her father, Reginald FitzPiers, was 47 and her mother, Alice Stanford, was 35. She married Sir John Mohun about 1267, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1294, in England, at the age of 40.

fr.Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales: Brecknock, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor FitzPiers est née en 1254, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Reginald FitzPiers, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Alice Stanford, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Mohun environ 1267, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1294, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor FitzPiers 1254 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald FitzPiers 47 und ihre Mutter Alice Stanford 35. Sie hat um 1267 in England Sir John Mohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1294 im Alter von 40 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor FitzPiers è nata il nel 1254 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, sua padre, Reginald FitzPiers, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Alice Stanford, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Mohun circa 1267, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1294, nel England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor FitzPiersが1254年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Reginald FitzPiersは47歳，母Alice Stanfordは35歳であった。約1267年にイギリスでSir John Mohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1294年にイギリスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor FitzPiers(이)가 1254년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald FitzPiers(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Stanford(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1267년 영국에서 Sir John Mohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1294년 영국에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor FitzPiers nasceu em 1254, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald FitzPiers, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stanford, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Mohun aproximadamente 1267, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1294, em Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor FitzPiers родилась в 1254 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald FitzPiers было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stanford, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Mohun около 1267 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1294 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor FitzPiers nació en 1254, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald FitzPiers, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Alice Stanford, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir John Mohun aproximadamente 1267, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1294, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
